rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns local property tax appraised value exemptions. Gov't Code §2306.147 governs housing finance division fee schedules. No overlap.
quote: The board shall have the specific duty and power to establish a schedule of fees and penalties relating to the operation of the housing finance division and authorized by this chapter
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses housing finance division fees and penalties, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
